response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of broad full-stack engineering experience with strong fundamentals in TypeScript, Node.js, and software craftsmanship, plus recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators which aligns with the role's agentic workflow focus. However, the resume lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years specifically building production-grade AI/GenAI solutions, RAG architectures, vector databases, or cloud-platform AI design at the depth a Staff Forward Deployed Engineer role demands. Customer-facing technical discovery leadership is also not clearly demonstrated.
strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js background with 15+ years of shipping production systems
Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow tooling matches a key technology
Demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, talks, and founding an open-source platform
concerns: No explicit evidence of 8+ years building production GenAI/AI solutions or RAG/vector DB systems
Cloud-platform AI design experience (AWS/GCP/Azure) is not concretely documented
Customer-facing discovery and enterprise stakeholder leadership not shown in employment history
